strengths: Successfully picked up the needle initially
Demonstrated basic instrument control during early transfers
Showed understanding of the transfer concept
weaknesses: Failed to complete the full task protocol
Did not transfer all six objects in both directions
Lost focus or momentum partway through the exercise

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Practice 12 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, focusing on completing each transfer before moving to the next
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the full task protocol

drills.name: Nondominant pickup rehearsal
drills.description: 3 minutes of first-hand pickups using the nondominant hand only to build confidence in object handling

progression_note: At the novice level, focus on completing the full six-object bidirectional transfer sequence before worrying about speed. Build confidence through repetitive practice of the complete protocol.
